title: Remove Fog
body:
## What does this resource pack do?
A very simple resource package that **removes fog** through core shader. It also works on the fog added by some mods.
(Including blindness and darkness effects fog, fog on the horizon, underwater, and caves)
It only works on versions of minecraft that support modifying core shaders.

## How do I use it?
This is a simple resource package, you only need to copy the ZIP file to path **.minecraft/resourcepacks/**.

## In game:
**Blindness effect fog:**
![BlindnessEffectFog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e09140961502a15193aae4f1dff427fefcee5f2b.jpeg)
**Darkness effect fog:**
![DarknessEffectFog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b1510a16b78dea8918e4db01156993c39fdf518.jpeg)
**Underwater fog:**
![UnderwaterFog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbd19a45f4151491b1e6bf973dc1792ad20a1968.jpeg)
***
**1.1 VERSION CHANGES**

Bugs fixed in:
- glowing textures render
- lightning render
- enchant glint render
-  ...

Attention:
**This resource pack is incompatible with mods like Sodium that modify vanilla shaders.**
